title: Fernando Matía
text: Home * People * Fernando Matía Fernando Matía , a Spanish computer scientist and full professor in the area of systems engineering at Universidad Politécnica de Madrid (UPM). His main research areas have been in the area of Fuzzy control and interactive Robots . He published along with Pablo San Segundo et al. on bitboards [1] and an efficient bit-parallel Maximum clique problem solver [2] .
